title: A Framework for Low-Latency, LLM-driven Multimodal Interaction on the Pepper Robot
what_happened: arXiv:2603.21013v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Despite recent advances in integrating Large Language Models (LLMs) into social robotics, two weaknesses persist. title: Popular AI proxy LiteLLM got hacked with malware that spreads through Kubernetes clusters
what_happened: LiteLLM, a popular open-source proxy for AI APIs, has been compromised with malware that steals credentials and spreads across cloud systems. NVIDIA AI Director Jim Fan warns this represents a new class of attacks targeting AI agents. title: Agile Robots and Google Deepmind team up to bring AI-powered robots to factories
what_happened: Agile Robots and Google Deepmind are partnering to build AI-powered robots for industrial use. The Munich-based company will integrate Deepmind's Gemini Robotics models into its hardware. The article Agile Robots and Google Deepmind team up to bring AI-powered robots to factories appeared first on The Decoder.

title: Automating complex finance workflows with multimodal AI
what_happened: Finance leaders are automating their complex workflows by actively adopting powerful new multimodal AI frameworks. title: Securing AI systems under today’s and tomorrow’s conditions
what_happened: Evidence cited in an eBook titled “AI Quantum Resilience”, published by Utimaco [email wall], shows organisations consider security risks as the leading barrier to effective adoption of AI on data they hold.
